title: Legendary academy
overview: Tiara is a new student at Flora Girls Academy and she's reunited with her childhood friend Rosetta, who shows her around campus. Tiara is rather surprised at how easy it was for her to get into this prestigious school, but there might just be a catch...

title: Accord chase
overview: After finding out that her group is in danger of being expelled, Tiara tries to form a study group. Meanwhile, Rosetta keeps running off on her own after school, so the other girls follow.

title: Plucky bump
overview: Ashley accidentally forgets Lavie's birthday, leaving her in a grumpy mood. The girls play bumpball and try to win the tournament.

title: Identity
overview: Tiara is introduced to three sisters from Yamato who go to their academy, Kaede, Nadeshiko, and Tsubaki. Supposedly, they get along pretty well, but there seems to be some tension between Kaede and Nadeshiko.

title: Sunny day
overview: Lucifer and Angelica challenge Tiara and her group to a board game. Meanwhile, some of the other groups survey the forest after reports of something strange happening there.

title: Ruin Explorers
overview: The girls go look for Maryberry, who has disappeared. Meanwhile, some of the girls may have figured out the cause of the supernatural phenomena they've been sent to investigate.

title: Luminous hope
overview: Tiara and her group finally start getting some points. Tiara comes to the conclusion that she'd like to perform an Orchestra with her friends, and she finally finds out the truth about Yue.

title: Instinct olquestra
overview: Tiara and the rest of her group try to get ready for their first Orchestra and Tiara also learns more about her old sister Eliza and the unit she was in named Ray.

title: Gradience
overview: LiGHTs finds out that they actually didn't get enough points from their Orchestra and are expelled. Tiara is forced to go home and the rest of the girls try to figure out what to do.

title: Honorable princess
overview: The rest of LiGHTs travel to Waleland in order to go see Tiara.

title: Top concern
overview: Tiara and the others find out that a horde of Magical Monsters is headed towards Mamuceaster, so they try to head back, but Eliza stops them. Meanwhile, the other groups back at the academy get ready for the Ceaster Festival.

title: Specificity ornament
overview: All the girls perform Orchestras to try to thwart the horde of Magical Monsters heading towards Mamuceaster. Later on, we learn the secret that Eliza's been keeping.
